CREATE TABLE intervals (id UInt32, interval_value Interval);
INSERT INTO intervals VALUES (1, INTERVAL 2 DAY);
INSERT INTO intervals VALUES (2, INTERVAL 1 MONTH);
INSERT INTO intervals VALUES (3, INTERVAL 3 YEAR);
SELECT addInterval((SELECT interval_value FROM intervals WHERE id = 1), INTERVAL 3 DAY) AS result_1;
SELECT addInterval((SELECT interval_value FROM intervals WHERE id = 2), INTERVAL 5 MONTH) AS result_2;
SELECT addInterval(INTERVAL 1 YEAR, (SELECT interval_value FROM intervals WHERE id = 3)) AS result_3;
SELECT addInterval(INTERVAL 1 DAY, INTERVAL 1 WEEK) AS result_4;
SELECT addInterval((INTERVAL 1 DAY, INTERVAL 2 DAY), INTERVAL 1 MONTH) AS result_5;
SELECT addInterval((SELECT interval_value FROM intervals WHERE id IN (1, 2)), INTERVAL 2 DAY) AS combined_result;
SELECT addInterval(INTERVAL 10 DAY, (SELECT interval_value FROM intervals WHERE id = 1)) AS sum_result;
SELECT addInterval((INTERVAL 1 MONTH, INTERVAL 1 MONTH), INTERVAL 1 MONTH) AS total_months;
SELECT addInterval(INTERVAL 1 HOUR, (INTERVAL 30 MINUTE, INTERVAL 1 HOUR)) AS total_time;
SELECT DISTINCT addInterval(INTERVAL 1 DAY, INTERVAL 7 DAY) AS week_interval FROM intervals;
SELECT addInterval((SELECT interval_value FROM intervals WHERE id = 1), (SELECT interval_value FROM intervals WHERE id = 2)) AS combined_intervals;
SELECT addInterval(INTERVAL 5 HOURS, INTERVAL 15 MINUTES) AS total_hours_minutes;
SELECT addInterval((INTERVAL 1 DAY, INTERVAL 2 DAY), (INTERVAL 1 WEEK, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) AS complex_combined_interval;
